title: tests/: pytest coverage for simulator.py, finance.py, config_flow.py
acceptance_criteria: Uses enable_custom_integrations fixture and MockConfigEntry per pytest-homeassistant-custom-component conventions
simulator.py tests cover battery model presets, resampling behavior, and simulation loop correctness for known inputs
finance.py tests cover NPV/IRR (including nan-no-real-solution case), payback period, and each saldering scenario
config_flow.py test covers full 5-step happy path creating a config entry
